pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Is that so? Is that so?~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Who's there? Show yourself!

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Is that so? Is that so?~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Hey! Whoever's making it this dark, cut it out! I almost flew into a tree, ze!

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Ehehe~ Is someone there? I can't really see...

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: That's because you're the one spreading the darkness. Don't play dumb.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Oh, that's right! I forgot.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: ...You forgot that you were doing it?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: I do that sometimes. Are you a human?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: I'm a shrine maiden. I'm here to ask about the red mist covering Gensokyo. You wouldn't happen to know anything about that, would you?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Hmm~ Red mist? That sounds yummy.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: That is not an answer.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: I don't really know! But you smell like a human. Are you going to fly past me?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: That's the plan, yes.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Ehehe~ I don't think I'll let you.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Of course. I don't have time for this, so I'll make it quick.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: That's okay! I'm not very strong anyway~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Then why are you... you know what, never mind. Let's just get this over with.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: ...I think I bit my tongue.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Reimu Hakurei
post.text: That's for getting in my way.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: Are you going to eat me?

post.speaker: player
post.name: Reimu Hakurei
post.text: What??? no. Why would I eat you?

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: That's what I do when I win~

post.speaker: player
post.name: Reimu Hakurei
post.text: I'm leaving now.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: Ehehe~ Okay! Good luck with the mist, human!

post.speaker: player
post.name: Reimu Hakurei
post.text: Shrine maiden.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: Ehehe~

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: You got through my darkness?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Barely! I'm a magician, not a bat. Whoa.. you're pretty small to be a youkai, aren't ya?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Ehehe~ I'm Rumia! I eat humans sometimes.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: "Sometimes." That's weirdly reassuring. Name's Marisa. I'm in kind of a hurry, so how about you drop the darkness act and let me through?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Hmm~ No, I don't think so.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Yeah, figured. Look, I'd love to chat but I've got places to be, ze. So either move or we do this the fun way.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Ehehe~ Which one is the fun way?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: The one where I blast you. Ready?

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: Ouch, ouch, ouch... My eyes! Everything is too bright!

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: Aw, don't be like that. You did great for a little youkai!

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: I'm not little!

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: Right, right, sorry. You did great for a regular-sized youkai who eats people sometimes.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: ...Thank you~

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: You're a weird kid. I kind of like you. Don't eat anyone while I'm gone, alright?

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: I'll try~ But I'm hungry now because of you.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: There's probably some fairies around here somewhere. Knock yourself out.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: Bye bye~ ...Do fairies taste good, I wonder~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Hmm, so this fairy is also affected...

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Daiyousei
pre.text: You shouldn't be wandering around the lake right now. it's becoming quite a lovely shade of red, don't you think?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: I don't have time to play tag with a Greater Fairy. Step aside.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Daiyousei
pre.text: Cirno said I shouldn't let anyone pass. She's busy being the 'strongest' today, and I have to help keep the perimeter clear!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Cirno? That ice brat is behind this? No, she's not smart enough to manage a mist this thick.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: I thought only the big shots were feelin' the buzz, but you're lookin' pretty pumped for a commoner.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Daiyousei
pre.text: Are you here to steal the mist? It's not for humans to take!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Steal it? Nah, I've got enough junk in my house. But it's definitely boostin' your magic levels.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: STOP RIGHT THERE!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Out of my way.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: No way! I've been training since this mor—

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Since this morning, yes, you say that every time.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: W-Well this time I really have!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Mhm. Have you seen anything suspicious around the lake? Anything related to the mist?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: Ha! I'm not telling you anything until you fight me!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: ...So that's a no.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: I didn't say that!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: You don't know anything, do you.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: I know PLENTY! I know that you're going to lose to me today!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Same as always then. Don't cry when it's over.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: MARISA! Finally, I've been out here forever!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Hm, Lake Misty... the mist is definitely coming from further ahead...

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: Hey! I'm talking to you!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Wind's blowing east too. Interesting, ze~

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: I AM NOT THE WIND! I'm the strongest ice fairy in the world! I'm right here!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Oh, hey, it's you. When did you get here? You're blockin' my view.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: I'VE BEEN STANDING RIGHT HERE THE WHOLE TIME! Prepare to be turned into a popsicle, you blind magician!!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: ...You again?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Ehehe~ Oh! It's the shrine maiden!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: What are you doing all the way out here? You were back at the forest.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: I made a friend! She cooks lampreys. She has a cart and everything. The lampreys are really good~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Where is this friend now?.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: She flew ahead! She got asked to organize a great banquet! A really big one~ So there's going to be lots and lots of things to eat!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: A banquet. Who ordered it?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Hmm~ I don't know! But she said it was going to be huge~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: ...Interesting. Go back to the forest. Whatever is at the end of this road isn't a banquet you want to attend.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Ehhhh? No way! I have to get the food! I'll beat you if I have to~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Oh hey, it's the little darkness youkai from before! Little far from home aren't ya?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: I made a friend! She cooks lampreys~ And she got asked to organize a really really big banquet!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: A banquet? Out here?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Mhm~! Lots and lots of food. I'm following her so I can eat some~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Who ordered it?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Hmm~ I don't know! But she seemed very serious about it! Are you going to come to the banquet too~?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Oh I'm definitely going now. Mind if I follow your friend?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Yes! She's MY friend! And MY banquet! Go find your own!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Ahaha, come on, there's plenty of food for everyone right?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: I don't want to share.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Heh, fine. Let's settle it with danmaku, ze!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Hey, you there. I just ran into a small youkai who wouldn't stop talking about your lampreys.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: She's been following me all day! Isn't that sweet~ ♪

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Sure. Where are you headed with all that food?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: Delivery~! ♪ All the way to the Scarlet Devil Mansion~ Hm hm~ ♪

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: ...The Scarlet Devil Mansion?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: Big fancy place by the lake. Very important client!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: I'm afraid this delivery is going to have to be cancelled.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: Huh?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Whatever is happening at that mansion, I'm putting a stop to it. A banquet can wait.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Hey! Something smells incredible out here, ze!

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: ♪~ Hm? Oh my, a human~! Are you lost? ♪

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Nope! Just following my nose. Are those mushrooms?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: Roasted~ ♪ But it's not for sale I'm afraid~ Hm hm~ ♪

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Aw come on, just one? I've been flying forever, ze.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: ♪~ Nope nope~ Every single one is accounted for~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: How about this. Just one, and I won't slow you down.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: Are you trying to bribe me~?! ♪

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Absolutely!

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Mystia
pre.text: Ehehe~ I like you! But still no~ ♪

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Can't blame me for trying. Time for Plan B, ze!

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: ...You're not the one I was waiting for.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: No.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: Did you come from the forest road? You should've crossed paths with our delivery on the way here...

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Your delivery got held up. I'm Reimu Hakurei. Shrine maiden. I'm here about the red mist.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: And I'm the gatekeeper. And I was only ordered to let one person through today. That person isn't you.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: I just need to speak with whoever is responsible for the mist.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: Nobody enters without permission. Orders are orders.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: I just need to speak with whoever is responsible for the mist.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: I understand. But my job is this gate, and this gate stays closed. I don't make exceptions, not even for shrine maidens.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Even if Gensokyo is at stake?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: ...Even then. I'm sorry.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Then you leave me no choice.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: Nor me. Come, shrine maiden. I'll make sure it's a good fight at least.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Hong Meiling
post.text: A good fight deserves a good nap.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Reimu Hakurei
post.text: That's a pretty convenient philosophy.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Hong Meiling
post.text: It's worked for me so far.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: Halt! State your business!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Just a passing magician, ze. I'm the person nobody invited.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: That much is obvious. This is private property, turn back.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Private property in the middle of Gensokyo? Since when?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: Since my mistress decided so. And that's all you need to know.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Your mistress, huh. Is she the one behind the red mist?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: I wouldn't know anything about that.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Then let me through so I can ask someone who does, ze.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: No uninvited guests. Those are my orders and I intend to keep them.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Ahaha! Alright, I can respect that ze. But I'm getting through that gate one way or another.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Hong Meiling
pre.text: Then you'll have to go through me first. And I warn you, nobody has managed that yet.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: First time for everything!

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Hong Meiling
post.text: Well, I'll head back to sleep. The gate's yours.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: A mansion this big must have one heck of a library, ze~

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Hong Meiling
post.text: Don't even think about it.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: If a few books happen to find their way into my bag while I'm solving the incident, I wouldn't say no, ze~
